name: btrz-monitoring
description: Code to help instrument applications for monitoring.

scripts.commit-compiled-code: git add --force dist/ && git commit --allow-empty -m "Compiled code"
scripts.preversion: npm test && npm run delete-compiled-code && npm run compile && npm run commit-compiled-code
scripts.postversion: git push origin master && git push --tags

author: Betterez Inc.
